judgeReasoning: The response satisfies all three required points: it clearly states the default is static/in-memory BM25 with no database, gives specific conditions for adding embeddings (vocabulary/semantic mismatch and large corpus size), and explicitly states the BM25 lexical index should be kept even when embeddings are added, with embeddings as a complementary layer/re-ranker.
